# Epic Seed Template

Use this when a theme is larger than one phase and needs a durable parent issue.

Suggested title pattern:

- `Epic: <stable migration theme>`

```md
## Why This Epic Exists

- Why does this theme matter to the issue-centric migration?

## Boundaries

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Done When

- What would count as the Epic being meaningfully done?

## Candidate Planned Issues

- Planned issue A:
- Planned issue B:

## Related Docs / Related Issues

- docs:
- parent / child / follow-up issues:
```
